title: centaurea microptilon var. emporitana
intro: Centaurea microptilon var. emporitana, also known as Mountain Whitetop, is a variety of flowering plant in the sunflower family (Asteraceae). The plant is used in herbal medicine due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. Its medicinal properties also provide health benefits, such as relieving respiratory problems and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, Mountain Whitetop is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
